tasks.step: Add --version / -v flag to CLI and create tool launcher scripts
tasks.commit: feat: add CLI entry point and tool launcher scripts
tasks.notes: Added src/cli.ts supporting --version and -v, created tool and tool.cmd launcher scripts.

tasks.step: Implement validation for empty or blank strings
tasks.commit: feat: add empty or blank argument validation (Task 2)
tasks.notes: Added validation in src/cli.ts to reject empty or whitespace-only arguments with exit code 1.

tasks.step: Implement help command and help flags
tasks.commit: feat: implement help command and help flags (Task 3)
tasks.notes: Added help command, --help, and -h flag support. Added unknown argument validation with exit code 1.
Created tests/cli.test.ts to programmatically test CLI behaviors, covering version flags, help options, blank string rejection, and unknown commands.
Verified typescript compilation compiles without errors. Ran all 29 tests (including CLI test suite) and they all passed.
